list.name: Changes
list.comment:
refactor IO functions to utilize interpreter instance
- Updated IO functions to accept an interpreter parameter for proper garbage collection registration. - Modified `createLuaFile` to register the created Value with the interpreter's garbage collector. - Ensured that all IO-related functions and file methods now correctly handle the interpreter instance. - Improved the lines method to keep the fileValue alive during iteration, preventing premature garbage collection.

project.component: { "keyToString": { "Dart Command Line App.Unnamed.executor": "Run", "Dart Command Line App.logger_example.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Command Line App.main.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Command Line App.pp_error_multiline.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Command Line App.test.dart.executor": "Debug", "Dart Command Line App.test_parse_unfinished_string.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.Function with print statement works in local_anonymous_function_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.IO library in io_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.Tests in binary_format_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.Tests in coroutine2_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.Tests in coroutine_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.Tests in debug_setmetatable_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.Tests in error_reporting_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.Tests in lualike.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.Tests in lualike/test.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.Tests in string_gsub_empty_replacement_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.Tests in varags_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.UTF8 Library in utf8_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.bracket syntax throws error when using undefined variable as index in table_assignment_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.bracket syntax uses identifier name when variable is undefined in table_assignment_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.finalizers in gc_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.from Lua test suite in string_pattern_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.invalid table operations on non-table values in value_test.dart.executor": "Debug", "Dart Test.method chaining with self in function_call_syntax_test.dart.executor": "Debug", "Dart Test.named parameters without comma before vararg in varags_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.no corruption in string concatenation after pattern matching in utf8_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.parses all simple types in binary_format_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.pattern matching preserves emoji characters in utf8_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.pattern matching works with mixed ASCII and UTF-8 in utf8_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.pcall in base_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.reports correct file names in multi_file_stack_trace_test.dart.executor": "Debug", "Dart Test.returns error spans with message in state_error_test.dart.executor": "Debug", "Dart Test.self field assignment and access in function_call_syntax_test.dart.executor": "Debug", "Dart Test.should work with nested functions in debug_getupvalue_test.dart.executor": "Debug", "Dart Test.string.find with captures in string_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.string.gmatch with utf8.charpattern preserves UTF-8 characters in utf8_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.unpack should use same format validation in string_pack_validation_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.unreferenced table values are collected in table_traversal_reachability_test.dart.executor": "Run", "Dart Test.word captures in string_pattern_test.dart.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ChatTagsLlmMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ClientConfigCleanupMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.CodyAccountHistoryMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.CodyAccountsIdsRefresh": "true", "RunOnceActivity.CodyAssignOrphanedChatsToActiveAccount": "true", "RunOnceActivity.CodyConvertUrlToCodebaseName": "true", "RunOnceActivity.CodyHistoryLlmMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.CodyMigrateChatHistory-v2": "true", "RunOnceActivity.CodyProjectSettingsMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.DeprecatedChatLlmMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ToggleCodyToolWindowAfterMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "dart.analysis.tool.window.visible": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "gc__work", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "/home/kingwill101/code/dart_packages/lualike.worktrees", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager", "show.migrate.to.gradle.popup": "false", "vcs.patch.to.clipboard": "true" } }

configuration.name: self field assignment and access in function_call_syntax_test.dart
unreferenced table values are collected in table_traversal_reachability_test.dart

item.itemvalue: Dart Test.self field assignment and access in function_call_syntax_test.dart
Dart Test.unreferenced table values are collected in table_traversal_reachability_test.dart
Dart Test.unreferenced table values are collected in table_traversal_reachability_test.dart
Dart Test.self field assignment and access in function_call_syntax_test.dart

MESSAGE.value: use NumberLimits everywhere
add web example
add attrib.lua test file
const and package equality test cases
lua test suite workflow
drop extra utf8 test
fix expectation
add attrib.lua to test tool
add literals.lua from test suite
delete build dir
remove unused helpers
Refactor error handling to use LuaError

Add garbage collector configuration options
- Introduced "setpause" to adjust the collector's pause, returning the previous value. - Added "setstepmul" to modify the step multiplier of the collector, also returning the previous value. - Enhanced error handling for invalid options in collectgarbage.

Define functions in global _G table for load-isolated environments
- Added a special case to define functions in the global _G table when in a load-isolated environment and _ENV equals _G. - Enhanced logging to indicate when a function is defined in the global context.

Refactor string replacement logic
- Simplified the condition for incrementing the count of replacements. - Removed unnecessary check for `captureReplaced` and `replStr.isNotEmpty`.
gc changes
avoid repeating stack traces
avoid additional wrapper for to be closed vars
properly intercept io errors in luafile

refactor garbage collection access
- Removed direct initialization of GenerationalGCManager in tests, now using interpreter.gc for better encapsulation. - Added table versioning to track modifications, allowing for cache invalidation on table changes. - Enhanced logging to conditionally output debug information based on Logger.enabled. - Updated various files to utilize new GC access patterns, improving clarity and maintainability.

refactor IO functions to utilize interpreter instance
- Updated IO functions to accept an interpreter parameter for proper garbage collection registration. - Modified `createLuaFile` to register the created Value with the interpreter's garbage collector. - Ensured that all IO-related functions and file methods now correctly handle the interpreter instance. - Improved the lines method to keep the fileValue alive during iteration, preventing premature garbage collection.

Add logging library
- Introduced `LoggingLibrary` with functions for enabling/disabling logging, setting/getting log levels and categories, and resetting filters. - Updated `logger.dart` to include initialization logic and prevent multiple initializations. - Registered `LoggingLibrary` in `init.dart` to make logging functions available. - Refactored `lib_io.dart` to remove unnecessary parameters in logging calls. - Added unit tests for logging functionality in `logging_library_test.dart`.

Refactor LuaFile: Simplify method instantiation and remove unnecessary parameters
- Removed null parameters from BuiltinFunction instantiation in fileMethods. - Eliminated fileValue parameter from lines method to prevent premature garbage collection. - Updated createLuaFile to remove interpreter registration logic, simplifying the function.

GCAccess and GenerationalGCManager: Improve garbage collection handling
- Introduced a fallback global GC manager for contexts without an attached interpreter. - Updated GCAccess methods to return a default manager when no interpreter is present. - Enhanced manual step handling in GenerationalGCManager to better manage allocation debt. - Added debug logging for GC operations to improve traceability. - Cleared Box values in block environments to prevent old objects from retaining values after scope ends.

Refactor control flow and memory management
- Added checks to prevent nullifying box values with upvalue references in control flow. - Introduced `resetLoopEnvironment()` calls to ensure proper state management during loop breaks. - Implemented `clear()` and `trimTo(int maxLength)` methods in the stack for better stack management. - Updated `Upvalue` constructor to register with the garbage collector if an interpreter is provided. - Added `_isFreed` property to track if a value has been freed by the garbage collector. - Enhanced `free()` method to reset garbage collection bookkeeping for stale values.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Refactor control flow and memory management
- Added checks to prevent nullifying box values with upvalue references in control flow. - Introduced `resetLoopEnvironment()` calls to ensure proper state management during loop breaks. - Implemented `clear()` and `trimTo(int maxLength)` methods in the stack for better stack management. - Updated `Upvalue` constructor to register with the garbage collector if an interpreter is provided. - Added `_isFreed` property to track if a value has been freed by the garbage collector. - Enhanced `free()` method to reset garbage collection bookkeeping for stale values.
